offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, missed regulatory submissions cause project delays. We automate submissions instead of manual submission processes and tracking.
problem: Timely regulatory submissions are often missed, leading to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among contractors
try_it: Let users try submission scheduling and status tracking for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
